name: Heliosphere Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>防</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>覇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヘリオスフィア
desc: While your opponent has 4 or less cards in their hand and this card is the only monster you control, your opponent cannot declare an attack. Once per turn, if you control a Level 8 Dragon-Type monster: You can make this card become Level 8 until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: While your opponent has 4 or less cards in their hand and this card is the only monster you control, your opponent cannot declare an attack. Once per turn, if you control a Level 8 Dragon-Type monster: You can make this card become Level 8 until the end of this turn.
eff: While your opponent has 4 or less cards in their hand and this card is the only monster you control, your opponent cannot declare an attack. Once per turn, if you control a Level 8 Dragon-Type monster: You can make this card become Level 8 until the end of this turn.

attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
